en.text: to be brought on my way
the same which is made sorry
; person: or, sight in the person: or, in the sight
should get an advantage of us
. corrupt: or, deal deceitfully with in Christ: or, of Christ
Forasmuch as ye are manifestly declared
glory was to be done away
. by the: or, of the Lord the Spirit
. hath: Gr. is he who hath
; in despair: or, altogether without help, or, means
. in appearance: Gr. in the face
. he is: or, let him be
; in tumults: or, in tossings to and fro
be enquired of, they are the messengers
. bounty: Gr. blessing whereof: or, which hath been so much spoken of before
: in presence: or, in outward appearance
things made ready to our hand
. indeed bear: or, indeed ye do bear with me
him. with him: or, with me
. no man: Gr. this boasting shall not be stopped in me
. I will come: Gr. For I will come
I should be exalted above measure
I should be exalted above measure
. for you: Gr. for your souls
to them which heretofore have sinned
